course_title: INTRODUCTION TO TEACHING IN SPECIAL EDUCATION
description: Provides an overview of teaching in early childhood and K-12 special education and introduces the content of and highlights the underlying themes (e.g., inclusion, collaboration) embedded in teacher preparation courses required for licensing in early childhood special education and K-12 special education.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Special Education BSE, Elementary Education and Special Education BSE, or Special Education MS

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in Special Education BSE, Elementary Education and Special Education BSE, or Special Education MS
